record.title: Optimization Suite | Monte Carlo Optimization Standard Suite
record.content:
# Optimization Lab | Monte Carlo Optimization Standard Suite

- Algorithms: 3
- Benchmarks: 3
- Runs per pair: 3
- Parallel workers: 3
- Successful tasks: 27 / 27

Top algorithm by average rank: mealpy.swarm_based.WOA.OriginalWOA (rank 1.0).
